common.error: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.
common.disclaimer: Lolu lwazi luhlose ukukuqondisa kuphela futhi alumeli iseluleko somthetho. Hlala ubona umthetho oqeqeshiwe.

home.title: Yazi Amalungelo Akho
home.heroDesc: Ukuqondiswa kwezomthetho nezezimali okuqhutshwa i-AI, okusekelwe emthethweni wangempela waseNingizimu Afrika.
home.subtitle: Buza imibuzo yezomthetho ngolimi lwakho — uthole izimpendulo ezisobala nezinezingxenye.
home.trendingHeader: Lokho abantu baseNingizimu Afrika ababuza kona
home.ctaContractDesc: Layisha isivumelwano sokuqasha, sokusebenza, noma sekhredithi
home.catDebtDesc: Imali ebolekiwe, amazinga enzalo, nokubuyekezwa kwezikweletu.

chat.title: Imibuzo Nezimpendulo Zomthetho
chat.inputPlaceholder: Buza umbuzo wezomthetho noma wamalungelo ezimali...
chat.emptyState: Buza umbuzo wezomthetho noma wamalungelo ezimali ngolimi oluthile.
chat.disclaimer: I-MzansiLegal inikeza ulwazi lwezomthetho, hhayi izeluleko zomthetho.

rights.title: Umhloli Wamalungelo Ami
rights.headerDesc: Hlola amalungelo akho omthetho nezezimali ngesihloko. Thepha ikhadi elithile ukufunda okwengeziwe.
rights.knowledgeScore: Iphuzu lakho lolwazi — uhlole izindikimba zamalungelo ezingu-{explored} kwezingu-{total}
rights.evictionDesc: Umnikazi wendlu angeke akususe ngaphandle kwesiqondiso senkantolo ngaphansi koMthetho i-PIE.
rights.evictionDetail: Ngisho noma ukhohlwa inkokhelo yendawo, umnikazi wendlu angeke akuvale ngaphandle, ashintshi izinkulumo, anqamule amanzi nomkhanyiso wakho, noma asuse impahla yakho. Kumele bafake isicelo sesiqondiso sokuxoshwa enkantolo ngaphansi koMthetho Wokuqeda Ukuxoshwa Okungekho Emthethweni (PIE). Inkantolo izoxoxa ngezimo zonke, kubandakanya noma unezindawo zokuhlala ezinye, ngaphambi kokunikeza isiqondiso.
rights.evictionQuote: "Akekho umuntu ongaxoshwa ekhaya lakhe, noma indlu yakhe ibhidlizwe, ngaphandle kwesiqondiso senkantolo esenziwa ngemuva kokuhlolwa kwezimo zonke ezibalulekile. Ayikho umthetho ovumela ukuxoshwa ngokungahleliwe."
rights.payslipTitle: Umqashi wakho kumele akunike isicelo somholo
rights.payslipDesc: Unelungelo lokuthola izinombolo ezibhaliwe zokukhokha kwakho.
rights.payslipDetail: Wonke umqashi kumele anikeze isicelo somholo ngesikhathi sokukhokha. Kumele siqukethe imininingwane yomqashi, isikhathi esibalulwe, inkokhelo ngemali, izokukhiwa, kanye nenani elikhokhelwayo ngempela.
rights.defectiveGoodsDesc: Abahlinzeki kumele balungise, bashintshe, noma babuyisele imali impahla engaphephile noma enenkinga.
rights.defectiveGoodsDetail: Uma impahla ingaphephile, inenkinga noma ingahlangabezani nezinga lemvelo izinyanga eziyisithupha ngemuva kokuhanjiswa, ungayibuyisa ngaphandle kwejoba nasengozini nomthwalo womhlinzeki, udicilele phansi ukubuyiselwa imali ephelele, ukushintshwa, noma ukulungiswa.
rights.interestRatesDesc: Abahlinzeki bekhredithi ngeke bakhiphe inzalo ngaphezu kwemikhawulo eshiwoyo.
rights.interestRatesDetail: I-National Credit Regulator ibekela amazinga okunokwanda kwenzalo emkhiqizweni wekhredithi ngamunye. Asikho isivumelwano sekhredithi esinganikeza ngaphezu kwereyithi eshiwoyo, futhi noma yimuphi umthwalo owengeziwe awusebenzi futhi awunakekelwa.
rights.unfairDismissalDesc: Ukuxoshwa kumele kube okulungile ngokomthetho kanye ngenkambiso.
rights.unfairDismissalDetail: Ukuxoshwa akulungile uma umqashi engakwazi ukuphendula ukuthi kwakungezizathu ezilungile futhi inkambiso elungile yalandelwa. Unelungelo lokwaziswa ngesizathu sokuxoshwa okunqetshwa kanye nelungelo lokuphendula.
rights.dataConsentTitle: Izinkampani kumele zithole imvume ukusebenzisa idatha yakho
rights.dataConsentDesc: Ulwazi lomuntu siqu lungaqokelwa kuphela ngezivumelwano zakho.
rights.dataConsentDetail: Ulwazi lomuntu siqu lungaqokelwa kuphela uma uvuma, uma kudingekile ukufeza isivumelwano, noma njengoba umthetho udinga. Ungasusisa imvume nganoma yisiphi isikhathi, futhi iqembu elinelungelo kumele lime ukuqokelwa.

contracts.title: Hlola Impilo Yesivumelwano
contracts.uploadHint: Layisha isivumelwano se-PDF ukuhlola izingozi nezimpawu ezibomvu.
contracts.pdfLimit: I-PDF kuze kube yi-10 MB · Isivumelwano soqasha, sokusebenza, sekhredithi, noma sentela
